item.title: Heatstroke in Pets: Prevention and Treatment
item.description: Heatstroke in Pets: Prevention and Treatment Heatstroke is a life-threatening emergency that can affect pets quickly and without warning. Unlike humans, pets can’t sweat effectively to cool themselves down, making them extremely vulnerable to overheating.
